description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - macOS that runs on push to the master branch or any tag, and on pull requests. Use a macos-12 job to check out the repository with submodules, install Qt 6.7.1, configure CMake for a release build, build and test PokeFinder, package it, and upload the artifact. If the workflow is triggered by a tag, publish a release with the packaged artifact.
